title: Container Indexer
description: Search nearby container inventories and quickly transfer items, using vanilla-like interaction rules.
body:
Container Indexer is a client-side utility for quickly locating items stored in nearby containers and pulling them into your inventory. It provides a clean search UI and a fast workflow for storage-heavy worlds.

Features:
- Search UI (default key: K)
- Case-insensitive search (matches item names and item IDs)
- Inventory scan of nearby containers with results (counts + coordinates)
- Container-type filters (checkboxes) to include/exclude sources
- Container highlighting for quick navigation
- Item transfer to your inventory, with an optional enchanted-item preference flow
- Support for minecart containers (Chest Minecart / Hopper Minecart)

Container filters persist across restarts via a small client config file.

How to use:
1) Join a world/server with the mod installed (client-side).
2) Press K to open the UI.
3) Type an item name (example: “diamond”) and press Search.
4) Use the Containers checkboxes to include/exclude container types.
5) Click a result to transfer, or highlight its container.
